title: The Impact Of Proposed Tariffs
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
Following the announcement of proposed tariffs on Chinese-built and operated vessels, the immediate impact remains zero, as the measures are still under discussion. However, if implemented, the number of affected vessels would be massive, potentially disrupting global shipping, increasing costs, and reshaping trade routes on a significant scale. To give a full picture, 41.5% of the total inservice fleet was built in Chinese shipyards, including 22.2% of the global tanker fleet, 32.2% of the container fleet, and 11.6% of the gas fleet.
